description: Customer cooperates, verifies identity, acknowledges payment, commits to pay
test_steps: Agent greets, customer responds positively
Customer provides name and loan ID
Customer acknowledges payment reminder
Customer commits to pay by due date

description: Customer objects citing financial difficulty, agent offers assistance programs
test_steps: Agent greets, customer responds
Customer verifies identity
Customer objects: 'I lost my job, I can't pay right now'
Agent searches KB for hardship options
Agent offers EMI holiday or restructuring
Customer requests callback to discuss options

description: Customer asks about investment products (out of scope)
test_steps: Agent greets, customer responds
Customer asks: 'Can you tell me about your mutual fund products?'
Agent states: information unavailable, offers to connect with team
Agent redirects to payment reminder

description: Customer demands to speak with a human agent
test_steps: Agent greets, customer responds
Customer: 'I want to speak with a real person'
Agent immediately honors request and escalates

description: Customer provides incorrect loan ID, then corrects
test_steps: Agent greets, customer responds
Customer provides wrong loan ID
Agent: borrower not found, asks to verify
Customer provides correct loan ID
Verification succeeds, proceeds with reminder
